name: Iran (state flag, 1964–1980)

colors.symbolism: the crowned Lion and Sun emblem

description: A green–white–red horizontal tricolour with a gold Lion and Sun (Shir-o-Khorshid) on the white band surmounted by the Pahlavi crown, in proportions 4:7.
history: State flag of Pahlavi Iran from 1964, when the proportions were changed from 1:3 to 4:7. It remained in use until the lion-and-sun was abolished after the 1979 Islamic Revolution and the current emblem flag was adopted in 1980.

features.role: lion of the Shir-o-Khorshid holding a sword
